text.title: Release QA Cycle Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Perf stage skipped because 'we'll do it after release'; production regression follows.
antipattern.fix: Add waiver entry with approver + reason; if no waiver, hold release.

antipattern.symptom: Owner of strategy stage = 'QA team'; nobody signed off in practice.
Last 6 cycles closed with no retro; same problems recur.
antipattern.fix: Block cycle close until retro_note present.
